purpose: Beauty service before/after as native video transition.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: — {cultural_constraints_injection} | Motion: Smooth before-and-after transition for {service_descriptor}: starts on before state, wipe transition reveals after state, both states clearly visible, modest framing throughout, professional reveal pace, 7 seconds
anti_patterns: Avoid trying to substitute with image-to-video fallback chain — native generation is the point
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: V02. Saudi adaptation guidance: Modest framing throughout — see B01 compliance notes. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week beauty services. Compliance level: elevated.
